name: Hisabi Sync Health Overview
query: SELECT user AS "User:Link/User:180", device_id AS "Device ID:Data:160", entity_type AS "Entity Type:Data:160", status AS "Status:Data:120", COUNT(name) AS "Ops:Int:100", MAX(server_modified) AS "Last Server Modified:Datetime:160" FROM `tabHisabi Sync Op` GROUP BY user, device_id, entity_type, status ORDER BY `Last Server Modified` DESC
